brand.name: MyFortune
brand.tagline: Premium Pooja & Homa rituals, curated for modern devotees.

hero.headline: Sacred rituals, performed with perfection.
hero.subheadline: Book authentic Pooja and Homa services with verified priests, curated samagri, and complete guidance—at home or in temple.

home.browseRitualsDesc: See every homa and pooja we offer.

about.title: About MyFortune
about.description: MyFortune exists to bring authentic, scripture-aligned rituals to modern devotees with complete transparency and care. Verified priests, quality samagri, and guided experiences form the core of our promise.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.description: View upcoming bookings, past rituals, and saved favourites. This area will show personalized content for each devotee.

priests.title: Ritual performers
priests.subtitle: Verified, experienced priests who perform homas, poojas and life ceremonies with full Vedic discipline.

rituals.title: Ritual Catalog
rituals.subtitle: Explore homas, poojas, and special ceremonies curated for your occasions.

booking.title: Book a Ritual
booking.subtitle: A guided, step-by-step flow to choose your ritual, date, priest and preferences.
booking.kundliIntro: We've opened WhatsApp for you. If it didn't open, use the button below to contact us directly.
booking.kundliNote: Our team will share Kundli matching details, process and pricing on WhatsApp.
booking.bookingConfirmed: Booking confirmed. We'll review your details and contact you soon on WhatsApp or email.
booking.wherePerform: Where should the ritual be performed?
booking.specialReqsPlaceholder: Any sankalpa details, gotra, language preferences, etc.
booking.toastMessage: We opened WhatsApp and email with your booking. We will get back to you shortly.

otherServices.title: Other services
otherServices.subtitle: Kundli matching, astrological guidance, and muhurta selection by experienced practitioners.

kundli-matching.title: Kundli matching
kundli-matching.description: Traditional Vedic compatibility analysis for marriage and partnerships. Get detailed gun milan and planetary guidance from experienced astrologers.

guidance.title: Guidance & consultation
guidance.description: Personalised astrological and ritual guidance—muhurta, remedies, and life decisions. One-on-one sessions with our learned practitioners.

muhurta.title: Muhurta selection
muhurta.description: Auspicious date and time selection for weddings, griha pravesh, naming ceremonies, and other important life events.
